creator: hashiz@tomba.meridiani.jp
text:
This patch seems to good.

Please commit it.

In "Re: ports/113317: [PATCH] mail/p5-Email-MIME-Creator: update to 1.453" at Mon, 4 Jun 2007 09:10:06 UT

> Maintainer of mail/p5-Email-MIME-Creator,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/113317 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/113317

> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
